audit_items.proof_trace: The guard at L327 (`if (s_auctionStarts[asset] != 0) revert LiveAuction()`) runs for every eligible asset before any state write. The only write to `s_auctionStarts[asset]` (L353) is unreachable unless L327 passes, i.e., no live auction existed. Grep confirms no other code path sets `s_auctionStarts` to a non-zero value.
